TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_nipaluma-kabalu, title = nipaluma-kabalu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/nipaluma-kabalu} }

S.FORM: kabalu kabalu 一枝黃花 u siwkay nu kabalu i Taywan takalaway a bayu maazih tu, i 2000-4000m ku takalaw. anu adada' ku tangah, makamaw, makalat nu bau, taneng pasapayu. i Ouco China paluma' tu itiza. takuliway ku balu. hali ahebalay a lala'. acasa u sibunakay a lala' . tina nipaluma' mabaki isasa' nu kilang, acasa i tebal nu kilangkilangan. mapaluma' tu nu tademaw ayza. u cudad a ngangan: solidago virgaurea(benth.) a. gray var. leiocarpa u sapamat a ngangan: compositae u Amilika a ngangan: golden rod u zuma a cidekay a kamu Yuwatan: makin tasa madiav tu puah. Rukay: yangadhadhpu. Cou: vungavunga tanavikaru. u sulit nu Hulam アキノキリンソウ(秋の麒麟草,Solidago virgaurea var. asiatica)とはキク科アキノキリンソウ属の多年草である. 高さは70から80cm . u sulit nu Amilika Solidago virgaurea is an herbaceous perennial plant of the family Asteraceae. It is widespread across most of Europe as well as North Africa and northern, central, and southwestern Asia (China, Russia, India, Turkey, Kazakhstan, etc.). It is grown as a garden flower with many different cultivars. It flowers profusely in late summer. u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: kabar~ɾu kabar~ɾu **** u siwkaj nu kabar~ɾu i tajwan takar~ɾawaj a baju maaziħ tu, i ****-****m ku takar~ɾaw. anu adadaʔ~ʡ ku taŋaħ, makamaw, makar~ɾat nu bau, tanəŋ pasapaju. i ouʦo ʦħina par~ɾumaʔ~ʡ tu itiza. takur~ɾiwaj ku bar~ɾu. ħar~ɾi aħəbar~ɾaj a r~ɾar~ɾaʔ~ʡ. aʦasa u sibunakaj a r~ɾar~ɾaʔ~ʡ . tina nipar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ mabaki isasaʔ~ʡ nu kir~ɾaŋ, aʦasa i təbar~ɾ nu kir~ɾaŋkir~ɾaŋan. mapar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ tu nu tadəmaw ajza. u ʦudad a ŋaŋan: sor~ɾidago *irgaurəa(bəntħ.) a. graj *ar. r~ɾəioʦarpa u sapamat a ŋaŋan: ʦompositaə u amir~ɾika a ŋaŋan: gor~ɾdən rod u zuma a ʦidəkaj a kamu juwatan: makin tasa madia* tu puaħ. *ukaj: jaŋadħadħpu. ʦou: *uŋa*uŋa tana*ikaru. u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam ********(*****,sor~ɾidago *irgaurəa *ar. asiatiʦa)*********************. *********ʦm . u sur~ɾit nu amir~ɾika sor~ɾidago *irgaurəa is an ħərbaʦəous pərənniar~ɾ pr~ɾant of tħə famir~ɾj astəraʦəaə. it is widəsprəad aʦross most of əuropə as wər~ɾr~ɾ as nortħ afriʦa and nortħərn, ʦəntrar~ɾ, and soutħwəstərn asia (ʦħina, *ussia, india, turkə, kazakħstan, ətʦ.). it is grown as a gardən fr~ɾowər witħ manj diffərənt ʦur~ɾti*ars. it fr~ɾowərs profusər~ɾj in r~ɾatə summər. u siwkaj nu nipar~ɾuma u sanək nu nipar~ɾuma mar~ɾaħəʦi tu imər~ɾaŋ pasubana i ʦaʦudadan a r~ɾaʦur~ɾ u zuma a ʦidəkaj a kamu, sauŋaj misapajuʔ~ʡ a ʦidəkaj u sur~ɾit nu zuma a kamu-ħur~ɾam atu amir~ɾika
S.FORM: kabalu kabalu 一枝黃花 u siwkay nu kabalu i Taywan takalaway a bayu maazih tu, i 2000-4000m ku takalaw. anu adada' ku tangah, makamaw, makalat nu bau, taneng pasapayu. i Ouco China paluma' tu itiza. takuliway ku balu. hali ahebalay a lala'. acasa u sibunakay a lala' . tina nipaluma' mabaki isasa' nu kilang, acasa i tebal nu kilangkilangan. mapaluma' tu nu tademaw ayza. u cudad a ngangan: solidago virgaurea(benth.) a. gray var. leiocarpa u sapamat a ngangan: compositae u Amilika a ngangan: golden rod u zuma a cidekay a kamu Yuwatan: makin tasa madiav tu puah. Rukay: yangadhadhpu. Cou: vungavunga tanavikaru. u sulit nu Hulam アキノキリンソウ(秋の麒麟草,Solidago virgaurea var. asiatica)とはキク科アキノキリンソウ属の多年草である. 高さは70から80cm . u sulit nu Amilika Solidago virgaurea is an herbaceous perennial plant of the family Asteraceae. It is widespread across most of Europe as well as North Africa and northern, central, and southwestern Asia (China, Russia, India, Turkey, Kazakhstan, etc.). It is grown as a garden flower with many different cultivars. It flowers profusely in late summer. u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: kabar~ɾu kabar~ɾu **** u siwkaj nu kabar~ɾu i tajwan takar~ɾawaj a baju maaziħ tu, i ****-****m ku takar~ɾaw. anu adadaʔ~ʡ ku taŋaħ, makamaw, makar~ɾat nu bau, tanəŋ pasapaju. i ouʦo ʦħina par~ɾumaʔ~ʡ tu itiza. takur~ɾiwaj ku bar~ɾu. ħar~ɾi aħəbar~ɾaj a r~ɾar~ɾaʔ~ʡ. aʦasa u sibunakaj a r~ɾar~ɾaʔ~ʡ . tina nipar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ mabaki isasaʔ~ʡ nu kir~ɾaŋ, aʦasa i təbar~ɾ nu kir~ɾaŋkir~ɾaŋan. mapar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ tu nu tadəmaw ajza. u ʦudad a ŋaŋan: sor~ɾidago *irgaurəa(bəntħ.) a. graj *ar. r~ɾəioʦarpa u sapamat a ŋaŋan: ʦompositaə u amir~ɾika a ŋaŋan: gor~ɾdən rod u zuma a ʦidəkaj a kamu juwatan: makin tasa madia* tu puaħ. *ukaj: jaŋadħadħpu. ʦou: *uŋa*uŋa tana*ikaru. u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam ********(*****,sor~ɾidago *irgaurəa *ar. asiatiʦa)*********************. *********ʦm . u sur~ɾit nu amir~ɾika sor~ɾidago *irgaurəa is an ħərbaʦəous pərənniar~ɾ pr~ɾant of tħə famir~ɾj astəraʦəaə. it is widəsprəad aʦross most of əuropə as wər~ɾr~ɾ as nortħ afriʦa and nortħərn, ʦəntrar~ɾ, and soutħwəstərn asia (ʦħina, *ussia, india, turkə, kazakħstan, ətʦ.). it is grown as a gardən fr~ɾowər witħ manj diffərənt ʦur~ɾti*ars. it fr~ɾowərs profusər~ɾj in r~ɾatə summər. u siwkaj nu nipar~ɾuma u sanək nu nipar~ɾuma mar~ɾaħəʦi tu imər~ɾaŋ pasubana i ʦaʦudadan a r~ɾaʦur~ɾ u zuma a ʦidəkaj a kamu, sauŋaj misapajuʔ~ʡ a ʦidəkaj u sur~ɾit nu zuma a kamu-ħur~ɾam atu amir~ɾika
